case_title: CONTRERAS, FELIX et al vs. LOPEZ, ROSA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONTRERAS, FELIX CONTRERAS, INGRID AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ROSA LOPEZ, ROBERTO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ROSA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ROSA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ROSA
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ROSA

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONTRERAS, FELIX SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-15-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-21-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
ORDER , DECLARATION, ORDER & ORDER POSTING AND MAILING SUMMONS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ROSA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 837 FILMORE STREET APT. #5 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL OCT-15-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTFS. WAIVE ALL PAST DUE RENTS AND DAMAGES FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER OF THE PREMISE, INCLUDING COST OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES.

FELIX CONTRERAS, BERNARD F. LIBANTI, ESQ. INGRID CONTRERAS; VS. ROSA LOPEZ, ROBERTO IN PRO PER LOPEZ; 2:55 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF INGRID CONTRERAS AND DEFT. ROBERTO LOPEZ. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT. ALLYCE KIMMERLING, PRO TEM JUDGE. BRENDA FIELDS, REPORTER. JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS FELIX AND INGRID CONTRERAS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT, ROSA LOPEZ FOR RESTITUTION OF 837 FILLMORE STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94118 AND FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE AGREEMENT. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH, STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION UNTIL 10/15/93. PLTF'S. WAIVE ANY AND ALL PAST DUE RENT AND DAMAGES FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTIONS. PLTF'S. ALSO WAIVE ATTORNEY FEES AND COST.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
